TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit SceneParams extends System.Object implements class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IJsonModel`1<class Azure.AI.VoiceLive.SceneParams>, class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IPersistableModel`1<class Azure.AI.VoiceLive.SceneParams>
Public Class SceneParams Implements IJsonModel(Of SceneParams), IPersistableModel(Of SceneParams)
type SceneParams = class interface IJsonModel<SceneParams> interface IPersistableModel<SceneParams>

Docs.summary: Configuration for avatar's zoom level, position, rotation and movement amplitude in the video frame.

MemberSignature.Value: public SceneParams ();
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed
Public Sub New ()
public float? Amplitude { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<float32> Amplitude
Public Property Amplitude As Nullable(Of Single)
member this.Amplitude : Nullable<single> with get, set

Docs.summary: Amplitude of the avatar movement. Range is (0, 1]. Values in (0, 1) mean reduced amplitude, 1 means full amplitude.

MemberSignature.Value: public float? PositionX { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<float32> PositionX
Public Property PositionX As Nullable(Of Single)
member this.PositionX : Nullable<single> with get, set

Docs.summary: Horizontal position of the avatar. Range is [-1, 1], as a proportion of frame width. Negative values move left, positive values move right.

MemberSignature.Value: public float? PositionY { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<float32> PositionY
Public Property PositionY As Nullable(Of Single)
member this.PositionY : Nullable<single> with get, set

Docs.summary: Vertical position of the avatar. Range is [-1, 1], as a proportion of frame height. Negative values move up, positive values move down.

MemberSignature.Value: public float? RotationX { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<float32> RotationX
Public Property RotationX As Nullable(Of Single)
member this.RotationX : Nullable<single> with get, set

Docs.summary: Rotation around the X-axis (pitch). Range is [-π, π] in radians. Negative values rotate up, positive values rotate down.

MemberSignature.Value: public float? RotationY { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<float32> RotationY
Public Property RotationY As Nullable(Of Single)
member this.RotationY : Nullable<single> with get, set

Docs.summary: Rotation around the Y-axis (yaw). Range is [-π, π] in radians. Negative values rotate left, positive values rotate right.

MemberSignature.Value: public float? RotationZ { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<float32> RotationZ
Public Property RotationZ As Nullable(Of Single)
member this.RotationZ : Nullable<single> with get, set

Docs.summary: Rotation around the Z-axis (roll). Range is [-π, π] in radians. Negative values rotate anticlockwise, positive values rotate clockwise.

MemberSignature.Value: public float? Zoom { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<float32> Zoom
Public Property Zoom As Nullable(Of Single)
member this.Zoom : Nullable<single> with get, set

Docs.summary: Zoom level of the avatar. Range is (0, +∞). Values less than 1 zoom out, values greater than 1 zoom in.
